chapter_title: Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles
text: No local authority whose abandoned vehicle abatement and removal program is administered pursuant to Section 22665 shall be eligible for any disbursement from the Abandoned Vehicle Trust Fund pursuant to Section 22710.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 10. Removal of Parked and Abandoned Vehicles [22650 - 22856]
#### Article 1. Authority to Remove Vehicles [22650 - 22711]
##### § 22668

No local authority whose abandoned vehicle abatement and removal program is administered pursuant to Section 22665 shall be eligible for any disbursement from the Abandoned Vehicle Trust Fund pursuant to Section 22710.

*(Added by Stats. 1976, Ch. 29.)*

subsections.text: No local authority whose abandoned vehicle abatement and removal program is administered pursuant to Section 22665 shall be eligible for any disbursement from the Abandoned Vehicle Trust Fund pursuant to Section 22710.
